creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
After upgrade of Perl from 5.12 to 5.16 and upgrade of all dependent ports, there are warnings from each port using math/p5-Math-BigInt.

All those ports print:
overload arg '..' is invalid at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/Math/BigInt.pm line 153.

Fix: 

maybe: Comment out the line 153 in
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/Math/BigInt.pm.

Was suggested at http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-January/088851.html
How-To-Repeat: Upgrade Perl from 5.12 to 5.16:

   portmaster -o lang/perl5.16 perl-5.12.5

Reinstall all dependent ports:

   portmaster -R -r perl5-5.16.3_6

(the full list of reinstalled dependencies are on the end of the message)


After this upgrade, each port using Math/BigInt.pm shows warning:

# service sqlgrey restart
Stopping sqlgrey.
Waiting for PIDS: 986.
Starting sqlgrey.
overload arg '..' is invalid at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/Math/BigInt.pm line 153.



# mrtg --check
overload arg '..' is invalid at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/Math/BigInt.pm line 153.
Usage: mrtg <config-file>



Full list of Perl dependent ports:
